title: Light's Extended Potions
description:
A few new potions i added; new effects and recipes
for a better Minecraft Experience
body:
## About this mod
I created this mod for you, so Minecraft will be a little bit more intresting to you.
I added 9 different Potions with some custom effects that are really useful. Also i made a new item called "Gold wart" which you can craft with 4 gold nuggets and a nether wart. with that you can brew up a "Special Potion". With that you gain acces to the potions.
__________________________________________________________________________________________



<details>
<summary>Potions</summary>

  ### 1. Xray Potion

  Lets you view other mobs or Players trough walls. 
  
  Brew with a quartz block and special Potion
  
  ________________________________________________________________________________________
  

  ### 2. Potion of Magnetic

  This Potion will allow you to pick up items from more far.
  
  Brew with a Iron Block and a special Potion
  

  ________________________________________________________________________________________
  

  ### 3. Potion of Friendly Heal

  It will heal players around you and yourself too.
  
  Brew with a gold apple and a special Potion
  

  ________________________________________________________________________________________
  

  ### 4. Potion of Zero Gravity

  Lets you fly around with no falling and flying up; Zero Gravity

  Brew with any type of wool and a special Potion


  ________________________________________________________________________________________


  ### 5. Potion of Hostile Damage

  Will damage every hostile mob from the overworld around you.

  Brew with a Diamond Block and a special Potion


  ________________________________________________________________________________________


  ### 6. Potion of Experience

  A potion you can brew which gives you an amount of XP

  Brew with a enderpearl and a special Potion


  ________________________________________________________________________________________


  ### 7. Potion of God

  Will give u lots of effects; a very godly potion!

  Brew with Netherite Block (expensive but Strong!) and a special Potion


  ________________________________________________________________________________________


  ### 8. Potion of Saturation

  Just gives you saturation, but useful in some situations!

  Brew with Hay Ball and special Potion


  ________________________________________________________________________________________


  ### 9. Potion of Nature

  This potion will grow things if you stand in them and sneak (e.g. crops)

  Brew with Bone Block and special Potion

</details>

___________________________________________________________________________________________

For questions, bugs or suggestions feel free to join my DC - Server. 


It'll help me a lot if you report bugs! [-JOIN HERE-](https://discord.gg/6BrzCwaB)

___________________________________________________________________________________________


<details>
<summary>Other Items</summary>


### 1. Golden Wart

This item is used to make all potions.

Craft with a nether wart in the middle and gold nuggets in the corners!


___________________________________________________________________________________________


### 2. Special Potion

This potion has no effect but is used as a brewing ingredient

Brew this by combining a Golden Wart with a Thick Potion!


___________________________________________________________________________________________

</details>

___________________________________________________________________________________________

Also view one of my other Projects:
